flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Texas A & M University-Corpus Christi rose 37% between 2021 and 2024 (18.1% → 24.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Texas A & M University-Corpus Christi rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (35.9% → 40.2%).
